emails.subject: Re: CA Update for Steve for Tomorrow's Meeting in Pasadena
emails.subject_base: CA Update for Steve for Tomorrow's Meeting in Pasadena
emails.body: Re: CA Update for Steve for Tomorrow's Meeting in Pasadena He just left. He's staying at the Regal Biltmore. The fax there is: 213-612-1628 Phone 213-624-1011 (in case you need to call him). He lands tonight LAX at 5:31 p.m. on Continental 1948. Let me know if you need anything else. Jeff Dasovich Sent by: Jeff Dasovich 02/20/2001 12:44 PM

emails.subject_base: CA Update for Steve for Tomorrow's Meeting in Pasadena
emails.body: Re: CA Update for Steve for Tomorrow's Meeting in Pasadena Thank you. I'll be picking Steve up at the hotel and 9:30 am tomorrow morning. And thank you very much for paging him for me. Best, Jeff
